LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS' RENOTICED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR#: 8189

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VICINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION #378 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT NJR STEEL INC. DBA NJR CONSTRUCTION COMPANY DOES 1-X, INCLUSIVE $31,477.76 PRINCIPAL, $1,250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $454.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $33,182.26, SEE SCANNED DOC
